siteTitle.description: The main title of the site.

Item.title: Item
Item.description: An item for sale in the personal bazaar.

description.description: The full description of the item.

category.description: The category of the item (e.g., Electronics, IT, Cameras).

mainPhoto.description: The URL of the main photo.

additionalPhotos.description: A list of additional photo URLs.

isSold.description: Whether the item has been sold.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the item was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the item was last updated.

items.description: A collection of items for sale.
